{{Quote|It was a careful bid. The Chancellor may be meek, but he is an intelligent man. I wouldn't underestimate him. He's up to something, I can promise you that.|Sh'neel comments on Palpatine's brodacast|<ref name="HN" />}}
'''R'shinnos Sh'neel''' was a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Genassa/Legends|Genassa]] and served in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. When [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] released a broadcast asking the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] leader [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] to meet for negotiations, Senator Sh'neel told the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] that they believed the Chancellor had made a cautious move, calling him both intelligent and meek, but warning others to be careful of Palpatine as the senator suspects he had a hidden agenda.<ref name="HN" />

==Behind the scenes==
R'shinnos Sh'neel first appeared in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 48]] on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] website in [[2002]] in the article entitled "Palpatine to Separatists: Let's Talk". The article was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HN" />
